samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divides a 16-bit dividend by an 8-bit divisor and returns the quotient and remainder.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Two always blocks are used for the division operation. The first always block is a combinational block triggered by any change in the input values A and B. It updates the values of two registers, a_reg and b_reg, with the values of A and B, respectively. The second always block is also a combinational block triggered by any change in the input values A and B.</implementation>
</module>
